    People also ask
    What is a raft used for?
    0:26
    Rafts come in many forms, from soft and squishy to wooden and permanent, like the rafts built on lakes for swimmers to rest on and dive off. Other rafts are mobile — they're small, flat boats meant for transporting people or goods across a river, for example. If you raft, you travel by raft.

    Raft - Definition, Meaning & Synonyms - Vocabulary.com


    Vocabulary.com
    https://www.vocabulary.com › dictionary › raft
    Vocabulary.com
    https://www.vocabulary.com › dictionary › raft
    How does raft look like?
    0:21
    It is usually of basic design, characterized by the absence of a hull. Rafts are usually kept afloat by using any combination of buoyant materials such as wood, sealed barrels, or inflated air chambers (such as pontoons), and are typically not propelled by an engine.

    Raft - Wikipedia


    Wikipedia
    https://en.wikipedia.org › wiki › Raft

    How to Make a Raft out of Sticks for Kids

    YouTube·maryjlockwood·25 Sept 2012
    YouTube
    In this video
    "...So now I have to do the other side having tied both sides. Together I'm now adding three bigger sticks horizontally to the raft. All that's left to do is to turn it over and it's ready to set...."
